summary: A Go-based monolithic test runner integrating Model Context Protocol (MCP) handlers, orchestrated through isolated, ephemeral agent sessions.
concerns: proliferation of isolated agent directories (GOrchestra/glm-agents/*) suggests fragmented artifact management
heavy reliance on auto-committed session metadata cluttering git history
staged changes left uncommitted during analysis
suggestions: consolidate or garbage-collect archived agent session directories
implement a .gitignore rule or artifact storage outside of version control for session metadata
review and commit the currently staged changes
